## TRUST TIER

- [ ] **T1 — Verified:** Peer-reviewed, RCT, or meta-analysis
- [ ] **T2 — Reported:** Controlled experiment, platform-reported study
- [ ] **T3 — Expert:** Practitioner consensus, widely cited framework
